title: Nursery Rhyme. XXXVII. Literal
content:
Hickery, dickery, 6 and 7,
        Alabone Crackabone 10 and 11,
        Spin span muskidan;
        Twiddle 'um twaddle 'um, 21.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. XXXVII. Literal"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
